title: Cashier: Max 10 Pinned Items with Selection Menu + Unified Search with Popup Suggestions

requirements.text: Replace the current split Jasa/Barang product grid on the Cashier page with a single unified product display panel that shows a maximum of 10 pinned items at a time.

quotes: yang ditampilkan hanya beberapa saja, maximal 10

acceptanceCriteria: The cashier product panel displays at most 10 items simultaneously
Items are no longer split into separate Jasa and Barang columns/sections
All 10 displayed items are clickable to add to the cart as before

requirements.text: Add a 'Select Displayed Items' management menu/dialog on the Cashier page that allows the user to choose which specific inventory items (up to 10) are pinned and shown in the product panel.

quotes: dibuatkan menu pilihan barang yang mana yang akan ditampilkan

acceptanceCriteria: A button or gear icon opens a dialog/drawer listing all inventory items
User can select/deselect items to pin; selection is capped at 10
Selecting more than 10 items is prevented with a clear message
Saving the selection updates the product panel immediately
The selected pinned items persist across page reloads (stored in localStorage or backend settings)

requirements.text: Replace the current separated search inputs (one for goods, one for services) on the Cashier page with a single unified search bar that searches across all inventory items (both goods and services).

quotes: untuk kolom pencarian 1 aja tidak usah dipisah antara barang dan jasa

acceptanceCriteria: There is exactly one search input field on the cashier page
The search queries across all inventory items regardless of type (barang or jasa)
The existing separate search inputs for goods and services are removed

requirements.text: Implement a search popup/dropdown on the unified search bar that appears when the user types at least 1–2 characters, showing matching inventory items that are not in the current 10 pinned items. Clicking a result from the popup adds it directly to the cart.

quotes: untuk yang lainya akan pop up ketika diketik beberapa huruf di kolom pencarian

acceptanceCriteria: Typing in the search bar triggers a dropdown popup showing matching items filtered by name
The popup appears after at least 1 character is typed
Search results include items from both goods and services categories
Items already displayed in the 10-item pinned panel can also appear in search results
Clicking a search result item adds it to the cart and clears the search input
The popup closes when the search input is cleared or focus is lost

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (useActor.ts, useInternetIdentity.ts) or frontend/src/components/ui/
Cart functionality and checkout flow must remain unchanged
Backend API must not be changed unless strictly necessary for persisting the pinned item selection
nonGoals: Changing the inventory management page layout
Modifying the receipt or transaction history pages
Adding real-time search (debounced local filtering is sufficient)
Persisting the pinned selection to the backend (localStorage is acceptable)
